# Learn to Upholster

> The complete text of "The Working Upholsterer's Bible" by Shaun Greenwood (Greenwood Upholstery, Hebden Bridge, AMUSF accredited) — a free, in-depth upholstery reference covering both traditional and modern method, written from thirty years at the bench.

## Chapters
- [Webbing](https://www.learntoupholster.com/webbing.html): choosing jute webbing, the 8-strand interlace layout, the five-tack fixing pattern, and tensioning with a webbing strainer.
- [Contents](https://www.learntoupholster.com/contents.html): full table of contents — foundations, techniques, complete projects, the working workshop, and reference.

## About
- Author: Shaun Greenwood, master upholsterer, Greenwood Upholstery, Hebden Bridge.
- Topics: upholstery, re-upholstery, webbing, springing, stuffing, stitched edges, foam, buttoning, trimming, loose covers, traditional and modern method.
